titleStmt.title: SII 28.291: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 291. (A.R. No. 445 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-Perumāḷ temple, central shrine, north base.

p.hi: Dhanma-rāyar, son of Śāḷuva-Narasiṅga-r[āy]ar Śaka 1444, Duṉmati, Siṁha śu. 10 [Monday], Hastam. Irregular.

summary.p: The date quoted is wrong in every respect. The business portion of the record is also very clumsily drafted. The inscription records that the tāṉattār of the temple of Karivaṟ, appropriated the aḍimai-kāṇi (apportionment for engaging slaves ?) given by the kaikkōḷar (weavers ?) and gave away one female as the aḍiyāḷ of the God in view of the campaign of conquest being undertaken by Narasā-nāyakkar. The remuneration (paḍittaram) to her from the said temple was one nāḻi of cooked rice, (daily) and a house-site in the temple-precints (maḍai-viḷākam), apparently to facilitate these payments to her the donor allotted an tiru-viḍai-āṭṭam-charu (sarva-mānyam) 60 kuḻi of wet land irrigated by Deviyar-kuṟuchchi-ēri and 300 kuḻi of dry-crop land in Gaṇḍamāttaṉ compared No 450 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanśrī is written close to svasti and man is written after a gap. mahāmaṇḍalīśvaran harirāya vibhāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇḍan mūvarāyar kaṇḍan kaṇḍanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu koṭātān pūrvva dakṣiṇa paśśima Uttara catussamutrattipati gejaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya Īḻantiṟai koṇṭa rājātirāja parameśvaran jaga
tekarāyan rāyar cāḷuvanaraciṅkarāyar kumārar taṉmarāyar pṛdhivi rājiyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakāptam 1000 4 100 4 10 4 Itaṉmeṟ cellā niṉṟa tuṉmati samvasarattu siṁhanāya ṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum comavāramum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ malāṭākiya jaṉanāta vaḷanāṭṭu makatai maṇṭalam veṟu pirinta Āṟṟuk kūṟṟattu Ārakaḻar perumāḷ karivaṟku
cuvāmi naracā nāyakkar tikku vijaiyam paṇṇa veṇum Eṉṟu Ammaṇa nāyakkar kariyavarakkoyil tāṉattār kariyavarat tirumalai Appaṉ ciṟukkariyavar muvaraiyum muṉṉaṭṭuk koṇṭu navamāka kaikkoḷaṟ kuṭutta Aṭimai kāṇiyuṅ kuṭuttu mutala pu ceḻikoṉpiḷḷaiyāṉa makaḷ cevuka nācciyai Emperumānaṭiyāḷāka yiṭuvittu paṭittaram niṟṟam nāḻi Arici cātamum maṭaiviḷākattile
Orumaṉaiyum tiruviṭai Āṭṭam caṟuvamāṉiyam Āṉa teviyarkuṟucci Eri kiḻ nañcai nilattile Aṟupatu kuḻiyum tiruviṭai Āṭṭam caṟumāṉa Iṟaiili kaṇṭa māttān puñcai nilattil Irunūṟu kuḻiyum Oru taṟi māṉiyamum kuṭuttapaṭiyāle Iṉta kalveṭṭuppaṭi cantiṟātittiyavaraiyum naṭakka kaṭavatākavum Itukku Ahitam paṇṇinavaṉ gaṅkaikaraiyile kāraāmpacuvai
koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭaivarkaḷākavum §
Digital edition of SII 28.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
